recommendations.title: Ideal Home
recommendations.overview: A couple is going through marital troubles made worse when a previously unknown grandson shows up.

recommendations.title: The In-Laws
recommendations.overview: Right before his daughter's wedding, a mild-mannered foot doctor discovers that his new in-laws are international smugglers.

recommendations.title: Dick
recommendations.overview: Two high school girls wander off during a class trip to the White House and meet President Richard Nixon. They become the official dog walkers for Nixon's dog Checkers, and become his secret advisors during the Watergate scandal.

recommendations.title: The Craft
recommendations.overview: A Catholic school newcomer falls in with a clique of teen witches who wield their powers against all who dare to cross them -- be they teachers, rivals or meddlesome parents.

recommendations.title: Barefoot
recommendations.overview: The "black sheep" son of a wealthy family meets a young psychiatric patient who's been raised in isolation her entire life. He takes the naive young woman home for his brother's wedding an improbable romance blooms, as she impresses everyone with her

recommendations.title: Hamlet 2
recommendations.overview: Failed actor-turned-worse-high-school-drama-teacher Dana Marschz rallies his Tucson students as he conceives and stages a politically incorrect musical sequel to Shakespeare's Hamlet.

recommendations.title: Wind River
recommendations.overview: An FBI agent teams with the town's veteran game tracker to investigate a murder that occurred on a Native American reservation.

recommendations.title: Threesome

recommendations.title: The Girl with the Dragon Tattoo

recommendations.title: Bad Dreams
